comment: STAGED -- NOT YET BOOTABLE. ES45 is a Titan (21274) machine; EmulatR's TitanChipset is a scaffold (TODO titan-isystembus / titan-pci-route -- see journals/20260616_titan_21274_interface.md). model=ES45 currently resolves to ChipsetVariant::Titan, but Machine.cpp builds a TsunamiChipset (hardcoded) and has no Titan selection seam yet, so this manifest will NOT produce a faithful ES45 until the Titan path is completed. Kept here so the device manifest is ready when it is. Real ES45 = Titan dual G/A-port PA-chips + AGP, ALi M1543C south bridge, up to 4 EV68. PCI topology _PROVISIONAL. Strict JSON: no // or /* */ comments -- use comment fields.

pci_devices.name: isa_bridge
pci_devices.comment: STAND-IN (real ES45 south bridge = ALi M1543C). Placeholder until the ALi model + Titan path land.
